title: Li Auto Q1 2021 Financial Results
text: Li Auto's first quarter 2021 financial results showed strong growth. Quarterly total revenues reached RMB3.58 billion (US$545.7 million), with quarterly deliveries of 12,579 vehicles and a quarterly gross margin of 17.3%. Vehicle deliveries of Li ONE vehicles were 12,579 in the first quarter of 2021, representing a 334.4% year-over-year increase. Vehicle sales were RMB3.46 billion (US$528.7 million) in the first quarter of 2021, representing an increase of 311.8% from RMB841.1 million in the first quarter of 2020. As of March 31, 2021, the company had 65 retail stores covering 49 cities and 135 servicing centers and Li Auto-authorized body and paint shops operating in 98 cities. The company was growing its retail and service network substantially during this period.
